hooks.command: fe=5181; be=8000; if lsof -nP -iTCP:$fe -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then u="🔗 http://localhost:$fe"; elif lsof -nP -iTCP:$be -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then u="🔗 http://localhost:$be (API only — frontend not running)"; else u="⚠ Dev server not running — run ./dev.sh (app: http://localhost:5181)"; fi; printf '{"systemMessage":"%s"}' "$u"
